evals.prompt: I exported my Canvas course as an IMSCC file at /sessions/nice-amazing-babbage/mnt/HCDE 530/canvas/HCDE530_SP26.imscc — can you read through it and give me a table of all the assignments? I want: title, due date (in local PDT time), grading type, points possible, and submission type.
evals.expected_output: A table listing all assignments with the requested fields, correctly converted from UTC to PDT. Should demonstrate reading both module_meta.xml (for structure) and assignment_settings.xml (for due dates and grading).

evals.prompt: I have a Canvas export at /sessions/nice-amazing-babbage/mnt/HCDE 530/canvas/HCDE530_SP26.imscc. Can you extract the full module structure for me — what modules exist, what items are in each module, what content type each item is, and for external links, what the actual URL is?
evals.expected_output: A structured outline of all modules and their items, including content_type for each item and URLs for ExternalUrl items (pulled from module_meta.xml, not imsmanifest.xml weblink files).

evals.prompt: I need to build a small Canvas IMSCC file for import. The course is called 'HCDE 499 Test'. It should have one module called 'Week 1 — Getting Started' with three items: (1) an external link to https://slides.google.com/test titled 'Week 1 Slides', (2) an assignment called 'A1: First Build' due April 10 at 10pm PDT, graded complete/incomplete, submission type URL, (3) a subheader called 'Resources'. Can you generate the IMSCC file?
evals.expected_output: A working .imscc file (ZIP) with correct Canvas structure: imsmanifest.xml first, ZIP_STORED compression, g+MD5 identifiers, all required course_settings stub files, correct module_meta.xml with ExternalUrl self-referential identifier, and a valid assignment_settings.xml with UTC-converted due date.
